principles.summary: No explicit color-scheme/dark-mode signal observed; Animations present; reduced-motion not yet verified

findings.title: No explicit color-scheme/dark-mode signal observed
findings.evidence: Probe reported computed root colorScheme='normal'; dark-mode screenshots were not separately captured in pilot.

findings.title: Animations present; reduced-motion not yet verified
findings.evidence: Probe counted 18 active animations. Needs reduced-motion condition in scale run.

principles.summary: Pending active keyboard/focus/input-modality test; screenshot/DOM evidence is not treated as a pass.
Pending active wayfinding/search/menu-flow test; passive homepage evidence is not treated as a pass.
Substantial advertising/analytics chrome around editorial content

findings.title: Substantial advertising/analytics chrome around editorial content
findings.evidence: HAR/probe show 240 requests and external script hosts: nav.files.bbci.co.uk, static.files.bbci.co.uk, sb.scorecardresearch.com, static.chartbeat.com, mybbc-analytics.files.bbci.co.uk, emp.bbci.co.uk, uk-script.dotmetrics.net.

principles.summary: Desktop/mobile layout primitives showed no horizontal overflow.
Homepage core task appears available; task completion flow not exercised.
LCP above good threshold (14.9s); LCP above good threshold (13.5s); Total blocking time is high (1835ms)

findings.title: LCP above good threshold (13.5s)
findings.suggestedFix: Improve LCP by prioritizing the hero/content resource, reducing render-blocking work, and optimizing server/critical CSS delivery.

findings.title: Total blocking time is high (1835ms)
findings.suggestedFix: Reduce main-thread JavaScript by splitting, deferring, and removing non-critical third-party work.

principles.summary: Axe was blocked or failed, so no automated accessibility violation is asserted; judgement is based on DOM probes only.

findings.title: Lighthouse best-practices score 77
findings.suggestedFix: Review Lighthouse best-practices failures and fix console errors, deprecated APIs, unsafe patterns, and browser compatibility issues.

findings.title: Low non-JS discoverability (36%)
findings.evidence: discoverability found coveragePct=36%, isJsShell=False, raw status=200.

findings.title: Large third-party/network surface
findings.evidence: HAR recorded 240 requests; third-party count=238, third-party bytes=3927651. Script hosts include nav.files.bbci.co.uk, static.files.bbci.co.uk, sb.scorecardresearch.com, static.chartbeat.com, mybbc-analytics.files.bbci.co.uk, emp.bbci.co.uk, uk-script.dotmetrics.net.

principles.summary: Pending active no-JS/offline/reload resilience test; manifest/service-worker presence alone is not treated as a pass.
html lang='en-GB'; locale/deeper i18n flows not tested.
Pending active consent/account/commerce-flow review for dark patterns; passive homepage evidence is not treated as a pass.

findings.evidence: HAR summary recorded 240 requests and 4022305 transferred bytes.

findings.title: Low non-JS discoverability (36%)
findings.evidence: discoverability found coveragePct=36%, isJsShell=False, raw status=200.

principles.summary: Rigorous same-session memory leak test has not been run yet; previous single/coarse heap data is not treated as a pass.

verdict: Homepage pilot: 9 principles with issues; top concerns are high be-fast-and-stable: LCP above good threshold (14.9s); medium be-discoverable: Low non-JS discoverability (36%); low be-inclusive: axe injection blocked by CSP.
_pilotCaveats: Pilot judgments are homepage-only and intended to validate schema/aggregation before scaling.
Axe was injected via Runtime.evaluate; BBC CSP blocked unsafe eval so BBC a11y is Lighthouse/probe-only in this pass.
Memory evidence is a single heap snapshot, not a repeated-interaction leak proof.
_caveats: Axe blocked/failed; be-inclusive marked low-confidence pass rather than issue.
Memory principle pending rigorous same-session recheck; no pass/issue asserted from single/coarse heap snapshots.
Passive-only principles patched: trustworthy/resilient/natural-interactions/guided-navigation require active flow testing and are not counted as passes.
Supplemental Lighthouse/trace/reduced-motion evidence collected and merged.
